params.description: Data table appears showing student's collected data from warmup.

Vertical bar graph appears with Scale Preview System. Four clickable scale buttons visible: Scale of 1, Scale of 2, Scale of 5, Scale of 10. Graph displays student's data using currently selected scale.

beats.text: You know how to use different scales. But which one should you use for YOUR data?

elements.description: Data table showing student's collected data.
Vertical bar graph with Scale Preview System. Four scale buttons visible: 1, 2, 5, 10.

beats.text: Let's find out. Click each scale to see what the graph would look like.

params.description: All four scale buttons become active and clickable. Student can freely click between scales to preview how the graph looks with each option.

elements.description: Data table showing student's collected data.
Vertical bar graph with Scale Preview System active. All four scale buttons clickable for exploration.

beats.text: All four scales work for this data! You have choices.

elements.description: Data table showing student's collected data.
Vertical bar graph displaying student's data with whichever scale was last selected during exploration.
